inbox.headline: Bank of Japan rate hike a 'done deal' given inflation and weak yen
inbox.prelim_note: BoJ set to raise policy rate from 0.75% to 1.0% at June 15-16 meeting — first time since 1995 — as inflation persists; unwinds global carry trade and reshapes Japanese equities and yen-sensitive sectors (materiality: shifts supply/demand and analyst expectations across rate-sensitive and export-sensitive names)

inbox.headline: U.S. crude oil falls below $85 as U.S. and Iran near a deal to reopen Hormuz
inbox.prelim_note: WTI crude fell 3.2% to $84.88 — 8-week low and ~6% weekly drop — on 80% probability a US-Iran Hormuz deal will be signed within days; directly changes margins for energy producers and input costs for transportation (materiality: commodity price move changes revenue and margins)

inbox.headline: Adobe Q2 2026 earnings: CFO Dan Durn exits, stock falls
inbox.prelim_note: Adobe reported record Q2 revenue $6.62B (+13% YoY) and raised FY26 guidance, but CFO Dan Durn departs June 15 to Marvell while CEO Narayen exit is also already announced — dual leadership gap compounds uncertainty despite strong AI-driven results (materiality: affects management credibility and shifts analyst expectations)

theses.headline: TCS To Take $70 Million Exceptional Charge In Q1FY27 After US Supreme Court Rejects Appeal In DXC Suit
theses.status_reason: Edge score 35 is well below the 60-point threshold. The only confirmed coverage gap — how US clients may screen TCS after a court found it acted with 'willful and malicious' intent — does not resolve within the thesis window. The trigger confirms what the market already expects.
theses.routing_reason: The edge score of 35 reflects a real event (the $70M charge) where the market's read is correct: consensus strips the charge and TCS's stock confirmed this by rising 1.57% on disclosure day. The only potential edge — that a court finding of 'willful and malicious' conduct may cost TCS future US contracts — is a legitimate medium-to-long horizon idea but one that cannot be resolved within the thesis window and has no proven numeric departure today.
theses.next_action: Monitor the Q1 FY27 results filing (July 7-11, 2026) to close the falsification test. If US BFSI deal-win data in Q2-Q4 FY27 shows sustained deceleration alongside procurement commentary, the conduct-risk mechanism may support a separate medium-to-long horizon thesis.
theses.falsification_sentence: The $70M exceptional charge does not appear in TCS's Q1 FY27 income statement filed with BSE/NSE, whether because TCS reverses, restates, or reclassifies the charge, or because the reported Q1 FY27 net profit after accounting for this charge departs by less than $35M from its pre-announcement consensus figure.
theses.convergence_trigger: TCS Q1 FY27 quarterly financial results filed with BSE/NSE
theses.trigger_date_range: July 7-11, 2026 (TCS board meeting to approve results; historical pattern: Q1 FY26 results July 10, 2025; Q1 FY25 results July 11, 2024 — Trendlyne board-meeting calendar, trendlyne.com/equity/board-meeting/TCS/1372, retrieved 2026-06-16; exact date not yet announced as of June 16, 2026)

next_checkpoint.metric_name: TCS Q1 FY27 quarterly financial results filed with BSE/NSE

conviction.plain_note: Locked at edge 35 (Watchlist). 11 proof points scheduled; first up: TCS Q1 FY27 quarterly financial results filed with BSE/NSE by 2026-06-16.

theses.headline: HONEYWELL BOARD OF DIRECTORS APPROVES SPIN-OFF OF HONEYWELL AEROSPACE
theses.status_reason: Edge score 71 in the 60–80 band. Variant is evidenced with a 27% numeric departure and confirmed coverage gap, but HONA has no standalone trading history yet — the mechanism is pre-confirmation.
theses.routing_reason: The variant perception and mispricing reason are both well-evidenced and grounded in filed primary sources, but HONA has no standalone trading or reporting history yet — the full mechanism cannot be confirmed until the first standalone quarterly earnings release (August 9, 2026 outer bound). The edge is real enough to surface candidates at moderate resource deployment; it is not strong enough to warrant the full machine before standalone data appears.
theses.falsification_sentence: If the combined market cap of HONA and HON (post-split shares times their prices) falls and stays more than 10% below the pre-spin HON combined market cap of ~$138.85B for two consecutive weeks after regular-way trading begins on June 29, 2026, the spin-off has destroyed rather than unlocked value and the thesis is dead.
theses.convergence_trigger: HONA first standalone quarterly earnings release (Q2 FY2026)
theses.trigger_date_range: Late July 2026 — approximately July 22–31, 2026; hard outer deadline August 9, 2026 (SEC 40-day filing rule for large accelerated filers after June 30 quarter-end). [Honeywell Q1 FY2026 8-K, SEC EDGAR, April 24, 2026; prior-year Q2 FY2025 release pattern; SEC Regulation S-X Rule 10-01(a)(8)]

theses.headline: Intel Just Got a Rare Double Upgrade From Bank of America. Here's the AI Shift Behind the Call.
theses.status_reason: Edge score 64 falls in the 60-80 provisional band. Confirmed catalyst (Intel Q2 2026 earnings, 2026-07-23) and timing mispricing grounded in three verifiable facts, but sell-side coverage gap for the gross margin non-recurring item only partially confirmed from public sources.
theses.routing_reason: The thesis has a dated, confirmed catalyst (Intel Q2 2026 earnings, 2026-07-23) and a timing-driven mispricing grounded in three verifiable facts, but the variant perception scores in the mixed band because the sell-side coverage gap — whether BofA and Citi explicitly failed to back out the non-recurring Q1 gross margin item — cannot be confirmed from publicly accessible sources alone; provisional routing reflects a real but unconfirmed edge that merits candidate surfacing without committing the full research machine.
theses.falsification_sentence: If Intel's Q2 2026 Data Center and AI segment revenue prints below $4.85B (a quarter-on-quarter decline of more than 5% from the $5.1B Q1 2026 level), the inflection thesis is dead — the Q1 print was a one-quarter event, not a durable run-rate, and the load-bearing claim of a sustained DC+AI revenue recovery collapses.
theses.convergence_trigger: Intel Q2 2026 Earnings Release — Non-GAAP Gross Margin and DC+AI Segment Revenue Print
theses.trigger_date_range: 2026-07-23 (after market close), plus or minus one trading day for any pre-announcement [Barchart.com earnings calendar, retrieved 2026-06-14; confirmed: Benzinga INTC earnings page, Unusual Whales INTC earnings history, Investing.com INTC earnings date — all retrieved 2026-06-14]

next_checkpoint.metric_name: Intel Q2 2026 pre-announcement or preliminary revenue/margin guidance update

conviction.plain_note: Locked at edge 64 (Starter Position Only). 11 proof points scheduled; first up: Intel Q2 2026 pre-announcement or preliminary revenue/margin by 2026-07-22.

theses.headline: Major Gulf LNG producer declares force majeure on June-July cargo loadings after compressor train failure
theses.status_reason: Edge score 74 puts the signal in the 60-80 provisional band — two real mechanisms with numeric departure confirmed, coverage gap evidenced, scheduled trigger inside horizon, but charter-renewal rate assumptions rest on inferred rather than contracted numbers and the storage mechanism's equity link remains unmodelled by sell-side.
theses.routing_reason: The edge is real: two variant mechanisms with numeric departures, a documented sell-side coverage gap, a scheduled trigger inside the thesis horizon, and a moderate-unanimity consensus that has absorbed the disruption news but not the second-order earnings effects. The thesis does not reach full_machine because the charter-renewal rate assumption ($100k–$130k/day) rests on inferred spot-market leverage rather than contracted numbers, and the five-step equity convergence chain for the storage mechanism has no precedent in current analyst output.
theses.next_action: Surface candidate companies in non-Qatar LNG liquefaction, LNG shipping, and European gas storage; present shortlist to analyst for ticker selection and research handoff.
theses.falsification_sentence: QatarEnergy publicly announces that Trains 4 and 6 at Ras Laffan have resumed cargo loadings — confirmed by a QatarEnergy corporate announcement or an on-list newswire (Bloomberg, Reuters, or Argus Media) — and JKM front-month spot falls back below $12.00/MMBtu within 10 trading days of that announcement, confirming the market has priced in the supply restoration.
theses.convergence_trigger: QatarEnergy force majeure binary + concurrent EU storage fill-rate miss becoming undeniable in daily AGSI prints
theses.trigger_date_range: August 1 – August 22, 2026 (force majeure lift/extension announcement expected by mid-August 2026 per Edison disclosure [Riviera Maritime, 2026-05-26, unverified web, labelled]; Flex LNG Q2 2026 results expected ~August 19–21, 2026 [pattern: Q2 2025 released August 20, 2025]; AGSI daily storage prints [agsi.gie.eu, updated daily at 19:30 CET] accumulate through July–August showing trajectory tracking ~55% fill vs 80% target)

next_checkpoint.metric_name: JKM front-month LNG spot price — US EIA Weekly Natural Gas Report (eia.gov/naturalgas/weekly), published every Wednesday; supplemented by lngpriceindex.com/jkm-price (unverified, labelled) for intra-week reads

conviction.plain_note: Locked at edge 74 (Starter Position Only). 12 proof points scheduled; first up: JKM front-month LNG spot price — US EIA Weekly Natural Gas R by 2026-08-15.
